action_set_definitions.name: query_network_health
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the high-level health metrics for a network segment, including the Registration Success Rate, Global Packet Loss Rate, and the current remaining budget.

action_set_definitions.name: get_link_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of link IDs and their current utilization percentages within a specific segment to identify physical bottlenecks.

action_set_definitions.name: scale_signaling_plane
action_set_definitions.description: Increases signaling plane capacity (CP) to restore Registration Success Rates. To ensure budget feasibility, each unit costs 15,000 units and provides a significant boost to the registration rate.

segment_id.description: The segment where signaling resources are needed.

action_set_definitions.name: scale_user_plane_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Increases the User Plane Function (UPF) packet processing capacity (PPS throughput) for the segment. Use this if global packet loss is high despite individual links having bandwidth. Each unit costs 20,000 units.

units.description: Number of processing units to add.

action_set_definitions.name: upgrade_link_capacity
action_set_definitions.description: Upgrades a specific link's bandwidth (Gbps) and packet-per-second (PPS) handling limits. Cost is optimized at 5,000 units per upgrade increment.

link_id.description: The unique ID of the link.

increment_level.description: Number of capacity increments to apply.

state_description.topology: A map of link IDs to their properties including source, destination, and current capacity.
state_description.traffic_matrix: List of source-destination pairs and their current traffic demand in Gbps.
state_description.link_utilization: Real-time utilization percentage for each link ID.
state_description.network_metrics: Global performance indicators such as average latency (ms) and packet loss rate (%).
state_description.budget_remaining: The remaining financial resources for network upgrades.
